textByHash.19e25d91b141ed444be69b2be69ac07295f649e8: I am invincible! You stand no chance against me!
textByHash.253c05d52c663a76e35be7aad5ee9e3bc57c66b5: You did not heed my messages to stay away! You have brought doom down on to yourself!
textByHash.3b0db633044b298c0a0a1b361fef8c37e3e25051: Stop what you're doing or taste my wrath!
textByHash.402fe578db58947c4317c2dda8c4024fa28378e6: You are in my domain now! Begone lest you wish to be destroyed!
textByHash.7b84523b3fdb70fa096f8c71b62f11c8c5fd9434: You are no match for me!
textByHash.80231043664ed9cf7fd2a3bd608d0b7ebb1b29f5: And while your power is great, mortal, I will still resist you!
textByHash.8dc725f28447cd10cfd73e3c24ce0a3b4bc607e4: Your magical abilities are impressive, but my powers of archery will foil them!
textByHash.90670226498179179bba7b4d96a8db83cc1ceded: Behold, as my avatar descends to your level to extinguish the flame of your puny existence!
textByHash.9a43cdb72ebd6caffd11b1e2c0368afc25a8e7d9: Do not touch what is not yours!
textByHash.a1e7d30320cac552c5c1641b5ff6ca692ef9ac85: You, I can see, are a skilled warrior. Yet your might is no match for my magic!
textByHash.c916b6826bca2a43e455fe27edeb77ae109d665b: You are an able ranger, yet that is useless against my might!
textByHash.ca05b05591336b82151a50b61bff6f2e85fca6a3: There are many aspects to my being and there are many skills I possess.
textByHash.f6c1425334530209d62bf11e8e32c999d999fd74: I would not do that again if I were you!
textByHash.f979f06963237ae02b003acd8674160f7503fab1: You are bringing doom down on yourself!
